12570.built_by: Smiths Dock Co., Ltd. (South Bank-on-Tees, U.K.)
12570.history: Completed in August 1928. Whaler of South Georgia Co. Ltd. (Chr.Salvesen & Co., Leith, U.K.), taken over by the Admiralty in March 1940. Displacement: 251 tons. Transferred to the Soviet Union in February 1942. HMS Sulla (T/Skr. Thomas Meadows, RNR) was lost in the Norwegian Sea in March 1942 when en route in convoy PQ-13 to be delivered to the Soviet Union. The vessel was last seen in a gale during the night of 24/25 March in approx. 70°15'N/02°10'E. She was most likely lost by capsizing due to heavy icing in the bad weather.
commanders: T/Skr. George Mair, RNR (10 Aug 1940 - 13 Jul 1941)
Skr. William Norman Hurn, RNR (13 Jul 1941 - 8 Dec 1941)
T/Skr. Thomas Meadows, RNR (8 Dec 1941 - 25 Mar 1942 (+))

12641.history: Sold to be broken up for scrap in 1963
commanders: A/Lt.Cdr. Michael Grote Stirling, RCN (<15 Nov 45 - 1 Feb 1946)

12642.history: Sunk during the Battle of Cape Matapan, 210 of her crew were killed and only 39 survived. Amongst those killed was her Commanding officer Capitano Di Vascello Salvatore Toscano.

12643.history: Sunk during the Battle of Cape Matapan, 171 killed and 39 survivors and the Commanding officer was amongst them ( Capitano Di Fregate Alberto Ginocchio )

12644.history: Royal Netherlands Navy ship HrMs Abraham Crijnssen was transferred to the Royal Australian Navy on 26 August 1942. She was returned on 5 May 1943.
commanders: Lt. Arthur Irwin Chapman, RANR(S) (24 Sep 1942 - 4 May 1943)

12645.history: Decommissioned on 18 August 1946. Sold on 2 December 1947.

12646.history: Decommissioned on 10 May 1946. Sold on 18 February 1948.

12647.history: Decommissioned on 20 May 1946. Sold on 12 November 1947.

12648.history: Decommissioned on 6 March 1947. Stricken on 29 August 1957. Sold in 1959.

12649.history: Decommissioned on 28 October 1945. Stricken on 22 January 1948. Sold on 18 May 1948.

12650.history: Decommissioned on 13 March 1946. Sold in December 1946.

12651.history: Decommissioned on 5 April 1946. Stricken on 21 May 1946. Sold on 28 November 1947.

12652.history: Decommissioned on 16 April 1946. Stricken on 23 April 1947. Sold on 11 February 1948.

12656.history: Decommissioned on 27 March 1947Transferred to Greece on 3 November 1958 Returned to the USA to become a museum ship in 1998Restoration attempt was aborted and the vessel was sold and will be converted into a barge

12670.history: Sunk on 21 June 1945 off Okinawa by a Japanese Kamikaze aircraft

12671.history: Destroyed as an atomic bomb target at Bikini Atoll on 25 July 1946
